trump-congress-2025.matchedText: Thank you very much. Thank you very much. It's a great honor.
trump-congress-2025.notes: WSJ livestream with ~21 minutes of pre-show coverage before Trump speaks. Video total: 7435s (2h 3m 55s). Speech is 99 minutes. Pre-roll includes WSJ commentary, arrivals, and ceremony.
trump-congress-2025.method: yt-dlp audio extraction + Deepgram nova-2 word-level timestamps, cross-validated with YouTube auto-captions (srv3 format)

sotu-2024.matchedText: Good evening. Good evening. If I were smart, I go home now.
sotu-2024.notes: Video titled 'Full Speech' — starts almost immediately with Biden speaking. Very short intro (~5s of applause/silence before first words). Video total: 5240s (87m 20s).
sotu-2024.method: yt-dlp audio extraction + Deepgram nova-2 word-level timestamps
